metadata.name: Market / Exchange Tree
metadata.purpose: External TreeView data source for the relational exchange space between buyers and sellers: listings, offers, bids, negotiations, price discovery, settlement, fulfillment, trust, records, and outcome learning.
metadata.schema_backbone: Flat node_id / parent_id records compatible with taxonomy_seed_v0_1, comparator_tree_human_consumer_v0_2, and tree_business_commercial_v0_1
source_notes: Used reference/comparator_tree_human_consumer_v0_2.json and reference/tree_business_commercial_v0_1.json only as schema and viewpoint references, not as taxonomies to copy.
Market / Exchange is treated as the relational layer where buyer demand, seller supply, offers, bids, settlements, fulfillment, trust, and records meet.

Offers / Listings, Bids, Records, settlement steps, and related outcomes are represented through reusable object_folder_templates rather than duplicated as visible children below every comparable class.

Models, Evidence, and VRQs are deliberately not standard visible TreeView children; models belong to the Model activity tool, evidence belongs as fields/attachments/signals/records, and VRQs belong to the event/message stream.
ReferencePath nodes are included only to point toward other sector objects without creating fake Consumer or Business subtrees inside Market / Exchange.
metadata.relationship_to_consumer_tree: The Human / Consumer tree supplies buyer-side needs and comparison patterns. This Market / Exchange tree does not copy that taxonomy; it exposes the exchange objects and mechanisms where consumer demand can meet supply.
metadata.relationship_to_business_tree: The Business / Commercial tree supplies seller-side businesses, offers, jobs, invoices, and records. This Market / Exchange tree does not copy that taxonomy; it exposes venues, offer/bid mechanisms, settlement, fulfillment, trust, and market records.

OFT_STANDARD_EXCHANGE_CLASS.notes: Primary reusable Market / Exchange template. These virtual folders are not physically duplicated as visible TreeView children.

OFT_MARKET_PLATFORM_CLASS.notes: For venues, platforms, exchanges, and marketplace mechanisms that host or govern exchange activity.

OFT_MARKET_TRANSACTION_CLASS.notes: For transaction flow, settlement, escrow, fulfillment, and outcome classes.

OFT_MARKET_REFERENCE_CLASS.notes: For market rule, access, permission, signal, trust, and reference classes.

DGT_COMMON_MARKET_EXCHANGE.label: Common Market / Exchange Record
DGT_COMMON_MARKET_EXCHANGE.notes: General exchange rows that connect buyers, sellers, offers, bids, records, and outcomes.

DGT_MARKET_SIGNAL_EVIDENCE.label: Market Evidence / Signal
DGT_MARKET_SIGNAL_EVIDENCE.notes: For trust/evidence as market data and signals, not as standard visible Evidence children.
